No. 48-3 (1)12008/NCTE (N & 8).-ln exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (2) of Section 32 of the National Council for Teacher Education Act, 1993 (7~ of I993) the National Council forTeacher Education hereby ,makes the following regulations to amend the National Council for Teacher Education (Recognition Norms and Procedure) Regulations, 2009, namely :--, 1. These regulations may be called the National Council for Teacher Education (Recognition Norms and Procedures Amendment) Regulations, 20 IO. 2. They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the official Gazette. 3. In the National Council for 'Teacher Education, (Recognition NomlS and Procedure) Regulation, 2009, in regulation 8, in sub-regulation (5),- (a) For the words; figures and letters "the'lst day of April, 2010", the words; figures and letters "the Ist day of April, 2011 n shall be substituted; (b) For the, words and figures "Session 20 I0-20 I I", the word and figur-es "session 20 I 1-2012" shall be substituted. HASIB AHMAD, Member-Secy. [ADVT 1ll/4/131/09-Exty.1 Note :- The principal regulations were published in t~' Gazette ofIndia, Extraordinary, Part 1fI,Section 4, vide number F. 51-V2009-NCTE (N&S), dated the 31st August, 2009.
